channel.title: The Blog of Carles Cortes Costa
channel.description: Recent content on The Blog of Carles Cortes Costa

item.title: First Post
item.description: This is the first post on my new blog www.carles.cc. I will try to use this platform to fix some of the knowledge I generate through my work and hobbies in fields like I.T infrastructure, DevOps, CI/CD, hosting, docker, Raspberry Pi, Software Development and others.
